query:
SELECT
            r.name AS room_name,
            COUNT(m.id) AS count
        FROM rooms r
        JOIN conversations c ON c.id = r.conversation_id
        JOIN conversation_participants cp ON cp.conversation_id = c.id AND cp.user_id = $1
        JOIN messages m ON m.conversation_id = c.id
            AND m.sender_id != $1
            AND NOT (m.read_by @> to_jsonb($1::int))
        GROUP BY r.name
        HAVING COUNT(m.id) > 0
